---
title: "Linguistic Complexity Across Institutional and Public-Facing Communication in the U.S. House of Representatives"
author: "Nikolina Djogova"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
editor: visual
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Introduction

\## Relevance

\## Project Overview

# Research Question and Expectations

\## Research Question

\## Hypotheses \## Expectations

# Literature Review

# Methdology

\## Definitions? \## Data Sources \## Data pipeline \### Data Collection \### Data Storage \### Data Cleaning \## Measures \### Linguistic Complexity Measures and WHY \### Measurement considerations \## Analysis Strategy \### Descriptive Analysis \### Time Trends \### Regression \## One-minute speeches extension

# Results

\## Descriptive \## Model

# Discussion

\## Interpretation of results \## Implications

# Limitations

\## Data Limitations \## Measurement Limitations \## Conceptual Limitations

#Reproducibility

#Conclusion

#References
